channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 44A/N43: Dornbacher Straße
item.description: Due to track construction works in Dornbacher Straße there are redirections in both directions on the lines 44A and N43. Period: Line 44A: from Thursday, 16. April … [Since 27.03.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to track construction works in Dornbacher Straße there are redirections in both directions on the lines 44A and N43. Period: Line 44A: from Thursday, 16. April …
[Since 27.03.2026]

item.title: U5: Währinger Straße 40-42 to 54
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out during the day and, if necessary, during the night, during the time from 22:00 to 05:00 at … [11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out during the day and, if necessary, during the night, during the time from 22:00 to 05:00 at …
[11.01.2026 – 31.05.2026]

item.title: Brünner Straße from Schloßhofer Straße and Am Spitz to Karl-Schäfer-Straße
item.description: The stop Peitlgasse (direction Floridsdorf) of the public transport concerned is to Brünner Straße ON. construction phase 1 of 4 … [Since 11.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop Peitlgasse (direction Floridsdorf) of the public transport concerned is to Brünner Straße ON. construction phase 1 of 4 …
[Since 11.05.2026]

item.title: 77A: construction works, diversion over A23
item.description: Due to large-scale construction works the line 77A is redirected. Period: Monday, 22. September 2025 lasting about one year. [Since 06.10.2025]
item.content:encoded:
Due to large-scale construction works the line 77A is redirected. Period: Monday, 22. September 2025 lasting about one year.
[Since 06.10.2025]

item.title: Universitätsstraße crossing Landesgerichtsstraße and Garnisongasse
item.description: Transport measures are largely taken over by the construction works metro, also in the streets of the lower road network. [Since 03.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Transport measures are largely taken over by the construction works metro, also in the streets of the lower road network.
[Since 03.05.2026]

item.title: Aumannplatz 1 to Gentzgasse and Türkenschanzstraße
item.description: in the shadow of track construction works of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG, the pipe laying work takes place during the day in the area of the roadway and the bicycle strip and when the … is blocked [04.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
in the shadow of track construction works of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG, the pipe laying work takes place during the day in the area of the roadway and the bicycle strip and when the … is blocked
[04.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: Maxingstraße from crossing Hanselmayergasse to crossing Trauttmansdorffgasse
item.description: The affected bus lines are redirected, the passenger information is provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG. The installation of a district heating line … [Since 06.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The affected bus lines are redirected, the passenger information is provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG. The installation of a district heating line …
[Since 06.04.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Siebenbrunnengasse from junction Siebenbrunnenplatz and Reinprechtsdorfer Straße to 44
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: Donaufelder Straße 67
item.description: only in the idle time of the tram. [19.04.2026 – 26.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
only in the idle time of the tram.
[19.04.2026 – 26.06.2026]
